driver_subject: platform/x86: intel_cht_int33fe: Use the new i2c_acpi_client_count() helper
kernel_subject: i2c: acpi: Add an i2c_acpi_client_count() helper function
stage1_reason: Replaced custom cht_int33fe_count_i2c_clients() function with new kernel helper i2c_acpi_client_count(), removing 27 lines of ACPI resource handling code.
stage2_reason: Driver commit e4ec7a49ef8b explicitly states it uses the new i2c_acpi_client_count() helper, which matches the kernel commit introducing that exact helper function.
